---
title: "Find the Tornado Activity"
source: "Workshop Material"
author: "Emma Howard"
institution: "JUniversity of Kansas"
competency: [Data Mining, Forecasting]
tech-lang: [none]
main-format: [PDF]
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

Designed for a K-12 audience, the Find the Tornado activity provides weather data to students to use to identify which day a tornado occurred throughout Kansas. The students will use data visualizations to compare data across days.


## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/ku_Howard_Tornado_Forecasting)

This Material is under the [CC BY license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en)
